steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content:
A $3.5\%$ yearly increase means each year multiplies the previous house value by a growth factor.
$$1+0.035=1.035$$

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content:
The starting value is $196{,}000$, and the yearly multiplier is $1.035$. Therefore,
$$f(x)=196{,}000(1.035)^x$$
The answer is C.
